info.title: Elecz API
info.description: Real-time electricity price signals and contract comparison for Nordic and German markets. No authentication required.

get.description: Returns the current electricity spot price for a given zone in cents per kWh. Data from ENTSO-E, updated hourly.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: Electricity price zone. FI=Finland, SE=Sweden, NO=Norway, DK=Denmark, DE=Germany. Sub-zones: SE1-SE4, NO1-NO5, DK1-DK2.

200.description: Current spot price with price_eur, price_local, currency, unit, timestamp

get.summary: Get cheapest electricity hours in next 24-48h
get.description: Returns sorted list of cheapest hours, best consecutive 3-hour window, hours to avoid, and automation recommendation.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: Electricity price zone. FI, SE, NO, DK, DE. Sub-zones: SE1-SE4, NO1-NO5, DK1-DK2.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of cheapest hours to return. Default 5, max 24.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: Hours to look ahead. Default 24, max 48.

200.description: Cheapest hours list, best 3h window, avoid hours, recommendation

get.description: Returns current spot price, top 3 electricity contract recommendations, energy state (cheap/normal/expensive/negative), confidence score, and decision hint. Use this for contract comparisons and rich agent responses.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: Electricity price zone. FI, SE, NO, DK, DE. Sub-zones: SE1-SE4, NO1-NO5, DK1-DK2.

parameters.name: consumption
parameters.description: Annual electricity consumption in kWh. Default: 3500 for DE, 2000 for Nordic zones.

parameters.name: heating
parameters.description: Heating type: district or electric. Default: district.

200.description: Full signal with spot_price, top_contracts, energy_state, confidence, decision_hint, action

get.description: Returns the best action to take right now: run_now / delay / switch_contract / monitor. Recommended endpoint for automation and home assistant integrations.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: Electricity price zone. FI, SE, NO, DK, DE. Sub-zones: SE1-SE4, NO1-NO5, DK1-DK2.

parameters.name: consumption
parameters.description: Annual electricity consumption in kWh. Default: 3500 for DE, 2000 for Nordic zones.

200.description: Optimization result with action: run_now / delay / switch_contract / monitor
